issue_title: [Bug]: @layer build error for non tailwind styling
issue_body_preview:
### Please take a moment to familiarize yourself with this project scope and standards

- [x] I have read the [Documentation](https://github.com/stefanobartoletti/nuxt-social-share?tab=readme-ov-file) and I understand how to correctly use this module.
- [x] I have read the [Contributing Guidelines](
test_description_zh: 在未使用 Tailwind CSS 的 Nuxt 项目中，引入 nuxt-social-share 模块后，访问首页并检查社交分享组件的样式是否正常渲染，确认构建过程中不会因 @layer 指令产生错误。
expected_result_zh: 页面正常加载，社交分享按钮/组件样式正确显示，无构建报错，CSS @layer 相关样式在非 Tailwind 环境下也能正常生效。
